originatingBug: reserveStock preserves the invariant that (available + reserved) before the operation equals (available + reserved) after the operation

declarations: (declare-const available_before Int) (declare-const reserved_before Int) (declare-const available_after Int) (declare-const reserved_after Int) (declare-const quantity Int) (assert (= available_after (- available_before quantity))) (assert (= reserved_after (+ reserved_before quantity))) (assert (not (= (+ available_after reserved_after) (+ available_before reserved_before))))
smt.assertion: (declare-const available_before Int) (declare-const reserved_before Int) (declare-const available_after Int) (declare-const reserved_after Int) (declare-const quantity Int) (assert (= available_after (- available_before quantity))) (assert (= reserved_after (+ reserved_before quantity))) (assert (not (= (+ available_after reserved_after) (+ available_before reserved_before))))
